title: Tang Yanfeng
content:
Tang Yanfeng
 is a member of the 
Tang Family
 of the four Great Families of the 
Southern Domain
 of the 
Allheaven Star System
. He, alongside 
Shengong Hu
 and 
Zhan Konglie
, is known as Southern Domain's Three Calamities.

History
[
]

Tang Yanfeng met Wang Lin in the 
Thunder Celestial Realm
 and hated him. However, when he saw 
Wang Lin
 battle with the 
Blood God
 and other more power cultivators, he had believed that Wang Lin (Xu Mu) was an old monster in disguise.

Yang Yanfeng later found out that Want Lin was no more than a mere junior at the 
Corporeal Yang
 stage, the fear of Wang Lin disappeared and instead was replaced with spite and hatred.

When Wang Lin later showed up at the 
Southern Domain
's Thunder Celestial tournament, Tang Yanfeng was the first to attack Wang Lin. However, Wang Lin had already become an early stage 
Nirvana Scryer
 and not at the 
Corporeal Yang
 as he thought, Tang Yanfeng was beaten miserably with one move. Afterward, a Tang elder showed hostile killing intent toward Wang Lin, Wang Lin activated the destruction energy that was left inside Tang Yanfeng's body and killed him on the spot.
